ead.archdesc:
======= RMA00871Seal and Serpent Society of Cornell University records37-4-871Compiled by Pat Stevens et al.Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Seal and Serpent Society of Cornell University records
Seal and Serpent Society (Cornell University)
37-4-871
12.5 cubic feet. 12.5 cubic feet.
1906-2009. Printed material, constitution, bylaws, meeting minutes, financial records, construction plans and specifications, photographs and correspondence. Materials relating to the Seal and Serpent, a local fraternity founded at Cornell in 1905. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 26 ======= 26 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2088665
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Pat Stevens et al.
Date completed:
April 1994
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, October 2003RMC Staff, February 2011
Date modified:
Fredrika Loew, October 2018
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
Local fraternity founded at Cornell in 1905.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Records include constitutions and bylaws, certificate of incorporation, 1919; correspondence, 1916-1965; Board of Directors', annual, and committee meeting minutes, 1906-1986; financial records, and construction plans and specifications; photographs, 1942-1991; many letters, accounts, plans, and other items relating to the presidency, beginning in 1923, of Creed Walsh Fulton ('09), during which a new house for the Society was planned, financed, and opened in 1927. Also, directories (incomplete run); directory questionnaires and personal data sheets; The Snake, the publication of the group; a printed petition, ca. 1907, to the executive board and chapters of Phi Kappa Sigma fraternity from the members of Seal and Serpent, asking for authority to establish a chapter of that fraternity at Cornell and including information concerning the fraternity system at Cornell at that time, a brief history of Seal and Serpent, a building fund prospectus, a group photograph, and a list of the petitioners with accompanying personal data; rush booklets; and miscellaneous items relating to the fraternity.
Also, group photograph including Alvin W. King (Class of 1907), one of the founding members of Seal and Serpent and bearer of pin number 1. CD with photographs of a ROTC event in September 2009.
Original bellows purchased as part of the original furnishings for the Lodge and selected by O. (Ornan) Hibbard Waltz, in 1927.
Access Restrictions:
Access restricted to written permission from the Society President, Vice President or Historian.
Cite As:
Seal and Serpent Society of Cornell University records, #37-4-871. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Walsh, Creed Fulton. Hibbard, O. Hibbard. Cornell University -- : Students. Cornell University -- : Societies, etc.

Scope and Contents
This epsiode features Bob Saget's visit to Ithaca and time spent with the fraternity.Additions and Alterations to 205 Thurston Ave.1982242Fraternity Information, Social Events, Centennial Celebration2000-2007243The Snake1928-2007244Bills, Taxes, Contracts, Bursar Billings2004-2005245Invoices2004-2005246Accounts Payable/Receivable2004-2005247Correspondence2000-2006248Original fireplace bellows192725A Brief History of the Seal and Serpent Society19--261Activities Center Reference Manual1983-1985262Alumni Directory1991263Balance Sheets and President's Material1989-1990264Balance Sheets2004-2005265Board of Directors1957-1998266Bylaws1958267Campus Organization Directory1983-1984268Chapter Assessment1984269Cornell Daily Sun Clippings19852610Cornell Housing Referral Service1989-19902611Correspondence A-G1957-19612612Correspondence H-Z1958-19602613Correspondence from Alumni1996-20012614Correspondence to Alumni1959-19962615Deposit Slips2004-20052616Draft of The Snake19912617Epsilon Sigs19842618Founder's Fund1987-19892619Goals for Officers1989-19912620Goals, Plans, Visioning2000-20012621Hell Week19982622Homecoming1984-19912623House Accounts - Audit19602624Housing Contracts2004-20052625Interfraternity Council1958-19862626Interfraternity Council Information Packet1971-19722627Letter Format for Pledge Parents19602628Meeting Minutes19602629Miscellaneous Papers1980-20022630
